name: Mirrodin Besieged

draft.notes: Foil appears after the land, displacing a common. 5 A (Mirran) commons + 5 B (Phyrexian) commons.

sourceNotes: Small set with two basic-land variations. US printing uses non-standard sequential collation to support separated Mirran/Phyrexian print runs. Foil 1:67. 36 packs per box. Prerelease boxes contained 18 Mirran-faction and 18 Phyrexian-faction packs (not modelled).
